scripts.dev:client: cd client && ${PM:-$(command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo bun || echo npm)} run dev
scripts.build: cd client && ${PM:-$(command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo bun || echo npm)} run build
scripts.check: biome check . && cd client && ${PM:-$(command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo bun || echo npm)} run check
